login.subtitle: Sign in to your Budojo account

register.subtitle: Join Budojo and get started today
register.name: Full name
register.privacyAcceptBefore: I have read and accept the
register.privacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to register.

verifySuccess.title: Email verified
verifySuccess.message: You're all set. Redirecting you to the dashboard…

verifyError.title: Verification link invalid
verifyError.messageCanResend: The link may have expired or been tampered with. Request a fresh one and we'll send you a new email.
verifyError.messageCannotResend: The link may have expired or been tampered with. Sign in to your account, then request a fresh verification email from the profile page.

setup.title: Set up your academy
setup.subtitle: You're almost there — tell us about your gym

whatsNew.title: Recent updates
whatsNew.subtitle: What's changed in Budojo lately, in plain language. Newest at the top.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The address you tried doesn't match any page on the site. It may have been moved, or the link is incomplete.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.subtitle: Spotted something off, broken, or missing? Drop a note here — it goes straight to the team. The current app version and your device info are attached automatically so we can reproduce the issue.

subject.label: Subject
subject.placeholder: Short summary — e.g. "Athletes list won't sort"

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: What were you trying to do, what happened, and what did you expect to happen?

image.label: Attach a screenshot (optional)
image.hint: PNG, JPEG or WEBP. Max 5 MB. One image per submission.
image.errorMime: Only PNG, JPEG and WEBP images are accepted.
image.errorSize: Image is too large. Max size is 5 MB.

toast.successDetail: Thanks — your message is on its way.
toast.errorDetail: Something went wrong sending your feedback. Please try again.

hero.headline: Run your academy from your phone, not from a spreadsheet.
hero.sub: Built by a BJJ instructor for instructors. Everything you used to keep on sticky notes and Google Sheets, in one place — on the phone you already carry to the mat.
hero.fineprint: No credit card. 2 minutes to set up.

pain.heading: If any of this sounds familiar, we built Budojo for you.
pain.point1: Belt promotions tracked in a notebook that's gone missing twice.
pain.point2: Medical certificates expiring without anyone noticing until the kid can't compete.
pain.point3: That one parent who's behind two months on the fee and you keep forgetting to chase.
pain.point4: Attendance scrawled on a clipboard that's older than half your students.

roster.title: Your roster, sorted.
roster.body: Every athlete in one place — belt, stripes, contact info, joining date. See who's been training, who's due for a promotion, who's owing fees. At a glance.

documents.title: Documents that won't expire on you.
documents.body: Upload medical certificates, ID, insurance — with expiry dates. The dashboard surfaces anything within 30 days of expiring before it becomes a problem.

attendance.title: Attendance without the clipboard.
attendance.body: One tap per student, daily summary, monthly trends. The mobile-first interface is built for the side of the mat, not the office desk.

payments.title: Who hasn't paid this month?
payments.body: Set a monthly fee, mark each athlete paid (or not). After the 15th, a dashboard widget surfaces who you still need to chase — before anyone has to ask.

pwa.title: Your academy, in your pocket.
pwa.body: Installable as an app on iOS and Android. Updates itself automatically when we ship. Works as well on a phone as it does on a laptop.

feedback.title: Send us a note when something breaks.
feedback.body: Spotted a bug or wishing for a feature? The in-app feedback form sends a message straight to us with the version + device info already attached.

builtBy.title: Built by a BJJ instructor.
builtBy.body: Not enterprise software pretending to know your world. Every feature exists because someone — usually the founder — needed it on the mat.

gdpr.title: GDPR-first. Your data is yours.
gdpr.body: Export everything you've put in with one click. Delete your account and we wipe it within 30 days. No tracking cookies. No third-party analytics.

italian.title: In English. In Italian.
italian.body: Both languages are first-class. Translated by a person who actually trains, not a machine. More languages on the way as the product reaches new markets.

setup.title: Set up your academy.
setup.body: Name, address, training schedule, monthly fee if you charge one. About a minute.

firstAthlete.title: Add your first athlete.
firstAthlete.body: Done — you're using the product. Another 30 seconds.

pricing.heading: Pricing
pricing.headline: Free during MVP.
pricing.body: No credit card. We'll tell you well before that changes — and you'll always be able to export everything and walk away.

footer.tagline: Made for the mat. Built in Italy.
